Vendored on: 2026-06-06
License file: JSZIP_LICENSE.markdown (fetched from
  https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Stuk/jszip/v3.10.1/LICENSE.markdown)

Update procedure: download the new version from the official source, verify
its published SRI/SHA256, replace jszip.min.js, refresh this record and the
license file, then run `make verify` (the single READY gate).
